description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The structure features a smooth, curved surface for skating, flanked by vertical walls and topped with metal safety railings. Both sides of the ramp are decorated with colorful graffiti art, adding an urban, street-culture aesthetic. One end of the ramp includes a staircase with a platform, providing access to the top for skaters. The ramp has an open central section, allowing for passage underneath or through the structure. The wood panels are visibly joined and reinforced, and the overall build appears robust and designed for heavy use.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with metal railings, graffiti art, and an access staircase, designed for urban recreational use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the graffiti-decorated wall, central open passage, and the peace symbol in the middle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the curved skating surface, interior of the half-pipe, and the staircase leading to the top platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more graffiti, the open passage, and the full height of the access staircase and platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the interior curve of the ramp and the underside of the staircase.
